title: Aanakkallan
overview: A murder happens at Ananthapuram Kottaram and DYSP Aana Esthappan is assigned to investigate the case. The initial investigation hints that Kallan Pavithran will be able to help in finding the murderer and DYSP Aana Esthappan requests one month parole for him.
